reviews.title: Valued for money
reviews.text: Good service, clean and good location

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
My reservation was for superior double room with 1 bed and they just me in to  a standard double with 2 beds. The next day they changed our room to the one we have booked however there is no any difference between apart of the bed. Rooms are so small and uncomfortable 
Apart of that the kitchen manager had bad behaviour to us and he was very rude and came to our table where we were eating to say loudly that breakfast was for one person .

reviews.title: No air-conditioning-terrible service
reviews.text:
I recently stayed at Mercure Hotel Berlin City for my honeymoon, expecting a 4-star experience with air-conditioning, as advertised. However, the air-conditioning in our room was not working, leaving the room extremely humid and stagnant.
I reported this to reception twice after my first night, and both staff members advised that if the outside temperature is not lower than 18 degrees, the air-conditioning cannot be used and suggested opening the windows. This was ridiculous, especially since the lobby, bar, and food areas all had functioning air-conditioning and were comfortably cool. Moreover, the hotel's location next to a tram track made sleeping with the windows open impossible due to the noise.
Our stay was highly uncomfortable, and we are extremely dissatisfied with the hotel's service. I cannot recommend this hotel to anyone expecting a comfortable stay.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text:
one of the stuff was rude . 
i asked for late checkout , they told me 15euro
and day later they say 30euro
no refregirator in the room , room is too small . 
next time it's better to take easy hotel for this kind of room.

reviews.title: Room
reviews.text: Room was nice location was near to train station, 10 min walk from train station.

reviews.title: This is not a four star hotel. I would give it two and a half stars at most.
reviews.positives: This hotel features nice pictures on the website, but when you come into the lobby what you get is an old dirty hotel, which should not be four stars at all. The pic of the lobby look nothing like what’s on the website. The hotel sits across from a giant old building that is being refurbished so there’s no fun stores or anything on the block. The first thing I noticed in the room was an old ratty ripped towel in the bathroom and then it went downhill from there,—the garbage pail in the bathroom was so disgusting and had never been cleaned out or anything. There was rust on the bathroom  floor. Do yourself a favor and don’t stay at this hotel.
reviews.negatives: On the second night, I realized I had no slippers or bathrobe and went and complained because that was featured in the website pictures and they told me that my room—even though it was called a superior room was not entitled to those items and that only privileged rooms got a bathrobe and slippers, but because I complained, they gave it to me. They gave me one small water and never gave me more and some days I walked in and there were small black stains on the sheets or pillows. The shower was good though. Toilet paper —cheapest! No wash clothes. The whole hotel has this old grey carpet which is dirty and musty. When I showed the manager a pic of the disgusting garbage pail she said - oh well— no replacement or anything. Lastly I was given two twin beds and asked for that to be changed as well at some point during my stay and they didn’t bother with that at all.

reviews.title: Location
reviews.text: Location was 10 minutes walk from train station, or you can take M8 or M10 city tram outside train station. It just 2 stop from train station, room was nice. I did not book with breakfast so nit sure how was the food.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Smallest room in a  4 star hotel I have ever gotten. No fridge even. They forgot to clean our room, towels not changed, glasses unwashed. Not the kind of service you would expect from a four star hotel. No mercure hotels again.

reviews.title: Good location
reviews.text: The location is good. Just one stop away from central station.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: No fridge for my medicine

reviews.title: Well funtioning hotel, clean but low on service.
reviews.text:
The hotel is business oriented, and a bit boring. It provides good facilities that, but as a couple we should have looked for something else. Service level is functional, but minimum. 

Location is ok, but not ideal for site seeing or experiencing Berlin
reviews.positives: Newer hotel, no frills that works

reviews.title: Okay High End Hotel, Bit Expensive
reviews.text: Enjoyed my stay at Mercure Hotel Berlin City, although I found it a bit expensive compared to the value.  Probably my fault for leaving my booking too late.  Liked the espresso machine in the room a lot, wish every room had one.
reviews.positives: Good location, nice modern rooms, pleasant areas to walk nearby

reviews.title: Near hauptbanhof
reviews.text: modern clean rooms. friendly staff. rooms had no safe however. good location to walk to or from hauptbanhof main station. also very close to oranierburg area with it's funky shops and restaurants. the breakfast was fine if included in the room deal but not worth paying for.  there are plenty of cafes on oranierburg strasse which serve breakfast with the bonus you can sit outside
reviews.positives: Good location

reviews.title: Great convenient location
reviews.text: Walking distance to most landmarks and easy access to public transport. Thermostat not adjustable. I set the temperature to 18° and it was still warm inside the room. Complimentary water provided however no fridge. Restaurant/Bar onsite serves good food if you dont want to venture out in the cold for dinner.
reviews.response:
Dear J.,

Thank you for your feedback regarding your recent stay with us. We are pleased to hear that you appreciated our convenient location and enjoyed the food at our restaurant. I apologize for the inconvenience you experienced with the thermostat and the absence of a fridge in your room. Your comments are valuable as we continuously strive to improve our guest experience. We hope to welcome you back in the future.

Larissa Wrobbel
Guest Relation

reviews.title: short vacation
reviews.text: attentive staff who help to handle our quick check-in

reviews.title: nice access from haupbahnhof
reviews.text: good choice to reach berlin haupbahnhof

reviews.title: Too expensive for this standart services
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Workers, room

reviews.title: Close to subway
reviews.text: Close to subway , clean , helpful staff
reviews.room_type: Superior Room with 1 King Size Bed

reviews.title: genuine 4-star hotel with friendly service
reviews.text: We were very pleased with our stay!  If you are not traveling with much luggage, you may conveniently access the property on public transportation (bus and subway stations are both less than a block away).  Altough our room was not ready because we arrived well ahead of check-in time (3:00 PM), we simply left our bags and returned later.  We were impressed by the modern and tasteful interiors - the hotel is really well kept!  Our standard room was truly comfortable (we had a choice of pillow types, for example).  We appreciated the complimentary coffee and tea and the nice bathroom amenities.  Storage areas (including a safety-deposit box) were adequate.  The flat-screen TV offered international programming.  Smoking rooms are available on request.  Staff at all times were friendly, helpful, and fluent in English.  When we return to Berlin, for sure we will again consider this good value-for-money option!
reviews.positives: competitive prices, modern interiors, helpful staff

reviews.title: Lovely staff and was close to station
reviews.text: It was good. The staff were friendly and helpful.
reviews.positives: Staff, bar and clean room

reviews.title: Good hotel
reviews.text: Good value for price. iT's a mercure so you know what to expect. The subway is 2mns walk
reviews.positives: Location, price

reviews.title: fiyat performans
reviews.text: Konum muhteşem, odalar çok temiz, her gün temizlendi. Ancak odalar çok küçük ve otelde sigara içecek sıcak bir alan yok! otobüs durağında bekler gibi kapı önünde ayakta sigara içiyorsunuz.
reviews.response:
Sayın M.,
Geri bildiriminiz için teşekkür ederiz. Otelimizin konumunu ve temizlik standartlarımızı beğenmiş olmanıza sevindim. Ancak, odaların boyutları ve sigara içme alanları ile ilgili yaşadığınız sıkıntıyı anlıyoruz. Sigara içme alanı konusunda farklı tercihleri olan misafirlerimize en iyi hizmeti sunmaya çalışıyoruz. Görüşleriniz bizim için değerlidir ve dikkate alınacaktır.

Saygılarımla,
Larissa Wrobbel
Misafir İlişkileri

reviews.title: Frontier only ladies in Korea.
reviews.text: They were kind and genuinely attentive to customers. They also kept my bag, so I was able to travel without any burdens. Please praise the lady named Idia, the owner. :)
reviews.room_type: Standard room with a double bed

reviews.title: Location satisfaction
reviews.text: The location is about a 13-minute walk from the central station. It's clean and has windows that can be opened, which is nice. It was a satisfying one-night stay.
reviews.response:
현숙님, 

저희 머큐어 호텔 베를린 시티에서의 숙박을 즐기셨다니 매우 기쁩니다. 중앙역과의 근접성과 청결함이 마음에 드셨다는 말씀에 감사드립니다. 고객님께서 만족스러운 경험을 하신 점을 듣고 저희 직원 모두가 큰 보람을 느끼고 있습니다. 앞으로도 더욱 나은 서비스 제공을 위해 노력하겠습니다. 

라리사 브로벨 
고객 관계 담당

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Our stay was great the hotel and staff were lovely. Would recommend this place to anyone.

reviews.title: Hotel
reviews.text: Good will come again

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: We stayed for four days , and we had a generally good experience. My husband participated in the Berlin Marathon, and the hotel's prime location was an important consideration for us. It's centrally located with an subway station and a tram stop close by. Other big pluses were the clean room and comfortable bed. However, an issue that was hard to overlook was the slow and intermittent Internet connection. For leisure travel, this might be a minor annoyance, but for business purposes, it could be a significant hindrance. We noticed that this has been a recurring issue in reviews by other guests. If you're traveling for business, this could be a deal-breaker. All in all, Mercure Hotel Berlin City offers a good stay, but they really need to improve their Internet service to make it perfect.

reviews.title: Nice hotel for a stay in Berlin
reviews.text:
Good location in that it is only a short taxi ride from airport (20 Euros) and 2 stops on the tram from the main station or a 15 minute walk.  The hop on hop off tour buses are at the station.

Hotel is very nice and the rooms are good.  Breakfast is good.

Staff are friendly and professional.  I particularly commend the breakfast room staff who were excellent.  

Forget the coffee shop which appears to be in name only - I sat in the coffee shop area on 2 separate days yet no staff were in attendance so I had to give up - not to worry though as there are coffee shops on the street nearby I could go to.

Reception staff a bit hit and miss although on the whole they were friendly and professional.  Difficult to get their attention for some reason.  Plus I left my credit card details with them so I could sign expenses to the room - but in other areas of the hotel (bar) they told me I had to pay cash as I had not submitted my credit card details.  I returned to the reception and left my credit card details again but it didn't work so I had to give up and just pay cash. 

No gym; no iron/ironing board in the room.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
My friend left her headphones in the room when we checked out, when she asked few minutes later just to let her go to check they didn’t allow her and told us they didn’t find them in the room. 
Besides, the reception staff doesn’t speak well English so it was very hard to communicate.

reviews.title: A decent nice mercure hotel
reviews.text: Not too far from the train station, however can be quite a walk to the center. Overall everything was nice with a mercure standard hotel.

reviews.title: Avoid if you can
reviews.positives: Location is great, but trams pass near and it is very noisy especially at night
reviews.negatives: The room was small, the hotel needed remodeling and the price was outrageous (260 Euro).

reviews.title: crazy convenient location
reviews.text: Great!!!
reviews.positives: location, location, location

reviews.title: would have been even happier with early check-in
reviews.text: We had stayed here once before and repeated because of the good value for money - competitive prices and location with easy access to public transportation and the central train station (under 5 minutes by bus or tram).  The hotel itself is modern and its has very tasteful interiors.  We quickly noticed that the reception was renovated in the last couple months or so.  Our standard room was small but very adequate and comfortable.  We appreciated the complimentary coffee and tea as well as the safety-deposit box.  We also enjoyed the flat-screen TV.  When we reserved, we submitted 2 requests - we did receive a smoking room, but could not complete check-in until the standard designated time (can´t remeber if it was 12:00 PM or 2:00 PM).  Other guests experienced similar situations, and the hotel did store our luggage while we went out.  After an intercontinental flight that arrived at 7:00 AM, we would have been thrilled to receive our room right when we arrived!  In any case, we would consider this property again.
reviews.positives: competitive prices, pretty convenient location, property very well-kept

reviews.title: Simple and nice with 5 star hotels features.
reviews.text: It is quite surprise for me when I stepped into the room. The room is quite spacious and there is a long table which not bringing feeling of working and a LCD TV which is better than most of the 5 star hotels. There is hairdryer in the room too. For me, it is a room like home.
reviews.positives: The room is great in terms of amenities and facilities.

reviews.title: good breakfast, worth staying
reviews.text: Although it need 15 minutes walk from the station, this hotel is worth staying.  The room is big and bright with electric pot to boil hot water so you can save money to buy drinking water. There's a lot of food provided in breakfast. If you can eat alot, you can save money to buy lunch.
reviews.positives: friendly staff, big room

reviews.title: Lovely and clean hotel
reviews.text: The hotel is very clean and the service is very good.The location just next to U bahn so is very easy to move around as taxi is expensive.From berlin hauptbahnhof only 1 or 2 stop.
reviews.positives: location

reviews.title: Good location and top notch service
reviews.text: Good location and top notch service. I asked them for a sewing kit to fix my dress which broke. They had it. I asked to borrow iron. They had it. Asked for a bowl of ice in the bar. Got it. They had coffee in the reception in the morning (for their taxi drivers, not guests, but I asked if I could have a cup and they said of course. Very good service. Used to travel on the cheap but found a good deal with this hotel and it was totally worth it. Very service minded and nice staff!
reviews.positives: Good location and top notch service

reviews.title: Comfortable stay. Good value.
reviews.text: The bedrooms were clean, modern and comfortable. The hotel is centrally located with a metro very close to the hotel. The hotel represented value for the price.
reviews.response:
Dear M.,

Thank you for your kind words regarding your recent stay at Mercure Hotel Berlin City. We are delighted to hear that you found our accommodations comfortable, modern, and clean, as well as appreciating our central location. It is always our aim to provide excellent value to our guests, and your feedback reaffirms our efforts. We hope to welcome you back in the future for another enjoyable experience.

Larissa Wrobbel
Guest Relation
reviews.room_type: Standard room with a double bed

reviews.title: good atmosphere
reviews.text: Wonderful stay with excellent service every day and a nice location. I stayed at this hotel for a week and took trips to other cities like Hamburg and Dresden from Berlin central station. The location was great for going to the station on foot; it took about 20 minutes from the hotel to the platform, and it was very convenient to go anywhere. Additionally, the hotel always cleaned my room. The room wasn't big, but the stay was very comfortable and reasonably priced. I highly recommend selecting this hotel if you are using Berlin central station.
reviews.response:
Dear guest,

Thank you for taking the time to share your positive experience at the Mercure Hotel Berlin City. We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed the ambience of our hotel and found your stay to be comfortable and convenient. The proximity to Berlin Central Station is indeed one of our key advantages, allowing guests easy access to explore nearby cities such as Hamburg and Dresden.

We appreciate your kind words regarding our housekeeping services. Maintaining a clean and welcoming environment is a top priority for us, and it is gratifying to know that our efforts contributed to your comfort during your week-long stay. We strive to offer reasonable prices while ensuring that our guests receive the quality of service they expect from our hotel.

Your recommendation means a lot to us, and we are grateful for your support. We hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you back in the future for another enjoyable stay.

Sincerely,

Larissa Wrobbel
Guest Relation

reviews.title: Facilities
reviews.text: There is no normal water in room only GAS water. Staff asked to buy it which is not acceptable or you drink water from tap.

reviews.title: Repetiré!
reviews.text: Me encantó la localización y la amabilidad del staff

reviews.title: It was amazing
reviews.text: It was all good

reviews.title: Great hotel next to subway
reviews.text:
The hotel is located not too far from the main station and next to a subway station. It is just beside Natural History Museum of Berlin where they housed the largest dinosaurs in the world. Near to great cheap food around the hotel vicinity. There is also a nearby supermarket. Getting to all the sights was easy by subway or walks. 

However, despite of having the "DND" tag outside the door, we came back with a surprise of a clean and tidy room. Other than that, everything was great.

reviews.title: Friendly staff
reviews.positives: Great Service, Friendly staff and clean room

reviews.title: Nice hotel!
reviews.positives: 10 mins walk to Berlin HbF, helpful staff, good at its cost, will definitely stay here again if I visit Berlin again

reviews.title: Comfortable and nice place
reviews.text: I like it. But, breakfast should be free next time
reviews.positives: closed to Bahnhof, comfortable and good

reviews.title: Great Berlin
reviews.text:
Very clean and comfort room.  Near to subway and not very far from main train station
Although the internet is a bit slow, but still acceptable for normal use.
The bad thing is the contruction of the rail in front of the hotel, bad traffice during peak hour.
reviews.positives: Very clean and comfort room.  Near to subway and not very far from main train station

reviews.title: Nice hotel in a great location!
reviews.text: Clean, quiet, and comfortable! Great location. Would recommend!

reviews.title: Great stay experience.
reviews.text: Overall, I enjoyed my stay at this hotel. Moreover, I stayed during their peak period at the 2022 Berlin Marathon. Since I had booked in advance, I got a fairly friendly rate with the facilities they offered. The location is quite strategic because it can be easily accessed by public transportation. I also had no trouble finding shops and places to eat during my stay here. The room is quite spacious and comfortable, as well as friendly and very helpful service from the staffs.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Excellent location, the personnel at the reception were very nice welcoming and helpful. I wish the carpets at the room were little cleaner. The rooms and facilities has a modern, fresh new feel. The bathroom was very nice and equipped (hair drier, zoom mirror, and more)

reviews.title: Nice place for short stays
reviews.text: Good stay as the location is quite central. overall comfortable although room size is quite small it is okay for short stays. Also, can extend a bit of basics like there is no mini bar in the room, no water bottles
reviews.positives: Good central location, next to a bus stop, good value for money

reviews.title: Good stay in Berlin
reviews.text:
- Location is good. Connected to public transport.
- The room is big, clean. Amenities are in good condition.

reviews.title: Perfect Stay
reviews.text: Nice clean hotel with friendly staff, great location with Tram and underground train close by so easy to get around Berlin. Only odd thing was the window between the room and bathroom, but there was a blind to pull down and cover it.
reviews.response:
Dear C.,

Thank you for your kind words regarding your recent stay at Mercure Hotel Berlin City. We are pleased to hear that you enjoyed the cleanliness of our hotel, the friendliness of our staff, and our convenient location. Regarding the window design in the bathroom, we appreciate your understanding and are glad that the blind provided a suitable solution. We hope to welcome you back soon for another enjoyable stay.

Larissa Wrobbel
Guest Relation

reviews.title: Great location
reviews.text: If you need to catch a train from Berlin Central station, this is the best hotel to stay. Only 1km from the Berlin Central Station. Easy access to the city centre where attractions are too!
reviews.response:
Dear guest,

Thank you for your kind words regarding your recent stay at Mercure Hotel Berlin City. We are delighted to hear that you found our location convenient for accessing Berlin Central Station and the city center's attractions. It is always our goal to provide a comfortable and accessible experience for our guests. We hope to welcome you back on your next visit to Berlin.

Larissa Wrobbel
Guest Relation

reviews.title: Weekend in Berlin
reviews.text: As a solo traveller, I wanted somewhere trusted and safe to stay. Room was clean and comfy, tea and coffee facilities, and more from reception as needed. Lovely toiletries. I was first given a twin room but reception gladly changed it for me. Great location, close to lots of transport options, max 20 min walk to Unter den Linden, 15 from Hauptbahnhof.

reviews.title: Mediocre
reviews.positives: Lounge bar, next to natural history museum and supermarket.
reviews.negatives: Stayed for one week and asked for an extra bed for the last night only for my child to join for one night. Was asked to book a larger room for the whole stay which I did. Was given a disability access room and told no other rooms available. There was a stain on one of the pillows and I asked to have the room cleaned, they just turned the pillow. Several stains found on carpet floor in the hallway. Forgot to put towels on the floor to get clean ones so when I asked reception gave me one set (room for 3 persons) and left the dirty ones in the room. When asked again, was given the additional sets to take up to my room myself and again, did not collect the dirty towels.

reviews.title: Aussie traveller
reviews.text: Great location. Staff very helpful

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.negatives: I had a very disappointing experience at this hotel. When I arrived, the receptionist spoke with Alina to us in a very unfriendly manner, which was not a good start. Then we were given keys to the wrong room, so I had to go back down to the reception. When I finally entered the room, it turned out that it wasn’t the one I had booked, and there was a terrible smell of chlorine. I had to go back to the reception again to get the correct room. After a long journey, this was really exhausting and frustrating.

reviews.title: Great location and helpful staff
reviews.text: Mercure hotel is only a few steps from a subway station and a tram/bus stop, and within walking distance of the main train station in Berlin. The Natural History Museum and a remnant of the Berlin Wall are also closeby. My room is clean and comfortable. Staff is very helpful with information.
reviews.positives: Location, Staff, and Comfort

reviews.title: Average
reviews.positives: Nice staff, breakfast was fresh and delicious
reviews.negatives: Situated on a busy street. The bathroom is compact, with towels positioned close to the toilet.

reviews.title: Nice hotel, geat location
reviews.text: Hotel is in a good location, walking distance to main transportation hub, Hauptbahnhof station. Also an easy walk to the many shops, restaurants, and attractions of Mitte. The hotel itself was clean, and modern. It was a comfortable stay with a friendly and helpful staff. I would not hesitate to stay again.
reviews.positives: Near Hauptbahnhof station, near many attractions

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: The bathroom and bed

reviews.title: Right next door the Underground Station and Tram Station
reviews.text: We found the hotel location convenient as it was just right next door the Underground U-Bahn Station and Tram Station.
reviews.response:
Dear S.,

Thank you for your positive feedback regarding the location of Mercure Hotel Berlin City. We are pleased to hear that our proximity to the Underground and Tram Stations contributed to your convenience during your stay. Our central location is indeed one of our key attributes, and it is gratifying to know that it met your expectations.

Best regards,
Larissa Wrobbel
Guest Relation

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.negatives: No slippers on arrival even if I asked for. Towels were not the cleanest.

reviews.title: Short but Sweet
reviews.text: My husband & I had a short but sweet stay at Mercure. We appreciate the location of the hotel because it's near Dhotonbori. We likewise appreciate the room & its facilities, especially the bathroom.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: The location was convenient next to the metro station. The bathroom was nice.
reviews.negatives:
The room didn't have a fridge which is a must have for some people like me.
The window was locked and it had a sign on it saying ask us if you need to open the window, we will be happy to open it for you. They were not. When I asked the reception to open the window to get some fresh air their first response was : you are not allowed to smoke in the room. I said I know that, we don't want to smoke,  we need some fresh air after two days. And they said ok. I asked for the key and they said the cleaning crew will open the window when they come to clean your room. 
When we returned to our room the window was locked again but probably they opened it for a few minutes while cleaning. I don't like to feel like a prisoner to a room that I paid for a respectable amount of money

reviews.title: Good value and clean accommodation!
reviews.text: I highly recommend this accommodation in Berlin. It's a bit of a walk from the station, but it was manageable with a suitcase, and it was clean, so I'm satisfied!

reviews.title: No fridge in the room, come on!!
reviews.negatives: No fridge in the room!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Location was fantastic, just 2 tram stops away from the Berlin Central Station and the hotel was just across the  Naturkundemuseum tram stop and beside the U-Bahn stop. So easy to explore Berlin from the location. Front desk was also very helpful. We enjoyed our stay!
reviews.room_type: Standard room with a double bed

reviews.title: Convenient location
reviews.text: Two tram stops or maybe 15 min walking distance from main railway station. Quiet neighbourhood in central location.  Easy access to public transport, tram stop is just outside hotel. Restaurants and also grocery store nearby. Hotel breakfast was good.

reviews.title: Great hotel
reviews.text: We loved the location near underground. Staff knowledgeable and friendly. Breakfast excellent in all respects. Facility to leave bag after checking out is useful.
reviews.room_type: Standard room with a double bed

reviews.title: it was amazing. receptionists are friendly.
reviews.text: It was just 3 days but I can say it was good cheap and will always consider goin back if I visit berlin again.
reviews.positives: cleanliness location and accessibility

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: recommende👍❤️
reviews.response:
Dear R.,

Thank you for your kind words and for recommending Mercure Hotel Berlin City. We are delighted to hear that you had an exceptional experience during your stay. Your positive feedback motivates our team to continue delivering excellent service.

We look forward to welcoming you back in the future.

Larissa Wrobbel
Guest Relation

reviews.title: Good location
reviews.text: Next to tram and U station, good hotel
reviews.response:
Dear A.,
Thank you for sharing your positive feedback regarding your recent stay at Mercure Hotel Berlin City. We are delighted to hear that you appreciated our prime location, which provides easy access to public transportation. Your satisfaction is important to us, and we look forward to welcoming you back for another enjoyable stay in the future.

Larissa Wrobbel
Guest Relation

reviews.title: A warm welcome to a cold city
reviews.text:
Mercure Hotel is perfect for the following reasons:
1. Its location is great - near museums, restaurants and the tram so going around is easy
2. Staff - friendly, warm, helpful
3. Value for money - with the nice amenities and perfect location, the amount spent for a room is just right..we stayed for 5 days
The only setback for me is the expensive breakfast which does not really offer that much variety
reviews.response:
Dear A.,

Thank you for taking the time to share your experience at Mercure Hotel Berlin City. We are delighted to hear that you found our location convenient, as we strive to provide easy access to the city's attractions, including museums and restaurants. It is also gratifying to learn that our team made a positive impression with their friendliness and helpfulness during your stay. 

We appreciate your feedback regarding the breakfast options. While we aim to provide a satisfying selection of items, we understand that variety is important to our guests. Your insights will be invaluable as we continuously seek to improve our offerings and ensure that they meet the expectations of our patrons. We hope you found the value of your stay satisfactory given the amenities we provide in conjunction with our prime location.

Thank you once again for your kind words and constructive feedback. We look forward to welcoming you back in the future and hope to exceed your expectations on your next

reviews.title: Nice hotel
reviews.text: Good location and nice reception

reviews.title: Nice
reviews.text:
Pro: clean, comfortable, less expensive, clean, super convenient with trains nearby, you can rent a bike from the hotel which made visiting the city that much easier

Con: tighter spaces (but to be expected for the budget)
reviews.room_type: Superior Room with 1 King Size Bed

reviews.title: Worth it
reviews.text: Excellent service and facilities. Will come again

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Clean and value for money

reviews.title: Very good hotel and staff
reviews.text: Right in front of train stop and very close to berlin hbf, very good location.

reviews.title: Nice Hotel in Mitte
reviews.text: I can highly recommend Mercure Hotel. It was easy to get to all of the tourist sites in Berlin from this location. The hotel room was clean and comfortable with good air conditioning.

reviews.title: Great Location and value for money
reviews.text: Nice hotel and friendly staff.Near to subway and walking distance to central HBF..We were allowed to early check in.The room very spacious and clean..

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: nice place and convenient to anyplace. near S and U banh

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Nos gusto el hotel
reviews.response:
Estimada G.,

Agradecemos sinceramente su comentario positivo sobre su estancia en el Mercure Hotel Berlin City. Nos complace saber que disfrutó de su experiencia y que nuestro hotel cumplió con sus expectativas. Su satisfacción es muy importante para nosotros y nos motiva a seguir ofreciendo un servicio de calidad.

Atentamente,
Larissa Wrobbel
Relaciones con los Clientes

reviews.title: Vacaciones
reviews.text:
Muy buen hotel
Excelente ubicación y buen desayuno 
Vale la pena por 4 estrellas buen precio calidad
reviews.response:
Estimado E.,

Agradecemos sinceramente sus amables comentarios sobre su reciente estancia en Mercure Hotel Berlin City. Nos complace saber que disfrutó de nuestra excelente ubicación y del desayuno que ofrecemos. Su reconocimiento sobre la relación calidad-precio de nuestro hotel es muy gratificante para nuestro equipo. Esperamos darle la bienvenida nuevamente en el futuro.

Atentamente,
Larissa Wrobbel
Relaciones con los Huéspedes

El barrio tiene todo lo q se necesita, muy lindo
reviews.room_type: Standard room with a double bed

reviews.title: Nice place
reviews.text: Near public transportation

reviews.title: Ideal gelegen
reviews.text: Der Aufenthalt war sehr angenehm. Wenngleich das Zimmer selbst für zwei Personen recht klein war. Es gab nur wenig Möglichkeiten einen zweiten Koffer zu verstauen. Außerdem verfügte das Zimmer über keine Minibar. Die Lage des Hotels ist ideal. Straßenbahn und U-Bahn direkt vor dem Haus. Alex, Hauptbahnhof und Friedrichstraße können zu Fuß erreicht werden. Es gibt viele Restaurants in der näheren Umgebung.
reviews.positives: Lage, Anbindung an öffentliche Verkehrsmittel,unkompliziert

reviews.title: Städtetrip
reviews.text: Die Unterkunft hatte eine tolle Lage und das Personal war nett und zuvorkommend. Das Preis Leistunngsverhältnis ist für diese Standart Zimmerversion erhöht.  Zumindest würde ich mir zu dem Preis  erhoffen.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: keinen Kühlschrank, kein Safe im Zimmer, Frühstücksbuffet zu wenig Auswahl daher überteuert

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Insgesamt gut, ich mag kein Teppich im Zimmer.

reviews.title: Während ITB ein satter Preisaufschlag
reviews.text: Das Hotel ist absolut empfehlenswert. Die Lage in unmittelbarer Nähe zum Hauptbahnhof macht eine Anreise per Bahn recht einfach und bequem (abgesehen vom zuverlässigen Verspätungsservice der DB). Aber gerade dann ist es gut, kurze Wege zu haben. Das Frühstück ist abwechslungsreich und vielfältig. Die Zimmer sind sehr sauber und funktionell. Mein Zimmer mit "Gartenblick" punktet zwar nicht gerade mit dem zu sehenden "Garten", aber es ist aufgrund der Lage zum Innenhof extrem ruhig. Sehr angenehm. Insgesamt, bis auf den marktüblichen, kompletten Ausreisser beim Preis während der Messe ITB, voll und ganz zu empfehlen.
reviews.response:
Sehr geehrter C.,

vielen Dank, dass Sie sich die Zeit genommen haben, Ihre positive Erfahrung in unserem Mercure Hotel Berlin City zu teilen. Es freut uns sehr zu hören, dass Sie die Lage unseres Hauses in der Nähe des Hauptbahnhofs als bequem empfunden haben. Ihre Anmerkung zur Anreise per Bahn ist besonders wertvoll, da wir stets bestrebt sind, unseren Gästen eine angenehme Anreise zu ermöglichen.

Ihr Lob über die Sauberkeit und Funktionalität der Zimmer sowie die Vielfalt unseres Frühstücks haben wir mit Freude zur Kenntnis genommen. Wir legen großen Wert darauf, unseren Gästen ein hochwertiges Angebot zu präsentieren, das ihren Bedürfnissen gerecht wird. Die ruhige Lage Ihres Zimmers zum Innenhof ist in der Tat eine willkommene Auszeit vom Trubel der Stadt.

Wir möchten jedoch anmerken, dass während großer Veranstaltungen wie der ITB die Preise an die marktüblichen Gegebenheiten angepasst werden. Wir danken Ihnen für Ihr Verständnis in dieser Angelegenheit und freuen uns, dass Si
reviews.room_type: Superior Room with 1 King Size Bed

reviews.title: Gutes Hotel mit super Frühstück
reviews.text: Ein schönes Hotel mit guter Anbindung. Für eine Städtereise ideal....

reviews.title: Gutes Hotel
reviews.text: Top Hotel für alle Art von Menschen. Super Service und gute Lage

reviews.title: Gutes Preis-/Leistungsverhältnis
reviews.text:
Sehr gute Lage (fast direkt neben einer U-Bahn-Station) in Zentrumsnähe, sehr gutes Frühstück, sehr freundliches Personal, Zimmer ausreichend groß und sauber.
Das Hotel versucht umweltfreundlicher zu werden.
Die Hotelbar ist aufgrund von Personalmangel nicht jeden Tag besetzt.
reviews.room_type: Standard room with a double bed

reviews.title: Schöne Aufenthalt
reviews.text: Super Hotel
reviews.room_type: Standard room with a double bed

reviews.title: gute Hotel,aber besser ohne Frühstück buchen
reviews.text: Ein wirklich tolles Hotel,jedoch war das Frühstück mit 19.00 Euro völlig überteuert.Man kann in ein paar Fußminuten wirklich super Frühstück für 7.00 Euro erhalten.

reviews.title: Sehr gut!
reviews.text: Das Hotel, die Lage, das Personal und auch das Frühstücks-Buffet waren der absolute Knaller. Würde ich immer wieder buchen. In den Zimmer hat man nichts gehört, diese waren auch gut ausgestattetet (Föhn, TV, Klima etc.) Super war auch, dass einem kostenloses WLAN zur Verfügung stand.

reviews.title: Alles top
reviews.text: Wir haben uns sehr wol gefühlt , sehr gutes Frühstück, alles zu Fuß erreichbar, schön zentral gelegen.
reviews.response:
Sehr geehrter Herr H.,

herzlichen Dank für Ihr positives Feedback. Es freut uns zu hören, dass Sie sich in unserem Hotel wohlgefühlt haben und unser Frühstück Ihren Erwartungen entsprochen hat. Zudem schätzen wir, dass Sie die zentrale Lage und die Erreichbarkeit der Sehenswürdigkeiten gelobt haben. Ihr Lob motiviert unser Team, weiterhin hervorragenden Service zu bieten.

Mit freundlichen Grüßen,
Larissa Wrobbel
Guest Relation

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Toplage und alles stimmte.
reviews.room_type: Standard room with a double bed

reviews.title: Suberes zentrales Hotel
reviews.text: Das Hotel hat auch diesmal wieder meine Erwartungen im vollen Umfang erfüllt, besonders der Super Komfort beim Frühstück. Das Personal war da wieder sehr aufmerksam und haben ohne aufdringlich zu wirken, gebrauchte Teller schnell und ohne vorherige Bitte vom Tisch entfernt und auch Kaffee und Spiegeleier waren schnell serviert worden. Ich komme gerne wieder!
reviews.room_type: Standard room with a double bed

reviews.title: Lugar ótimo. Staff maravilhoso
reviews.text: Lugar muito bom, localização excelente, perto de tudo. Equipe preparada e gentil. Voltarei sempre pra cá!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Perfect hotel qua prijskwaliteitverhouding om Berlijn te bezoeken. Ontbijt was eenvoudig maar goed. Kamers waren proper, goede bedden en geen last gehad van lawaai andere hotelgasten. Kortom prima hotel!

reviews.title: leuk hotel met prima ligging
reviews.text: Prettig verblijf met oud en nieuw. Schone kamers en prima ligging. Metro op paar meter afstand en binnen 2 haltes al midden het centrum.
reviews.positives: hond kan mee, vriendelijk personeel, fijne ligging

reviews.title: Its ok
reviews.text:
Location and staff are top points
Cleaning team amazing
Reception some are great some seem to get annoyed when i mention couple of minor things,while i was being polite felt dismissive behaviour
Bit over-dated can feel noisy on the street side
No fridge its a bit of let down 
Next time will look for something different but i would not spoke against it

reviews.title: Small but clean
reviews.text:
Nice room, everything you need. 

The room (no.325) is a bit small. Also the bathroom is very compact. You need to close the toilet before you’re able to flush it.

The airconditioning could be a bit colder. 18 degrees still feld like 25 degrees. Maybe it didn’t work out.

WIFI was free and quick. 

Would come back, but I would choose a bigger size room.

Overall it was a pleasant stay!

reviews.title: Geweldig hotel
reviews.text: Zowel de ligging als de kamers en het geweldige ontbijt zijn de prijs van dit hotel echt waard.
reviews.response:
Beste I.,

Hartelijk dank voor uw positieve beoordeling. Wij zijn verheugd te horen dat u genoten heeft van onze centrale ligging, de kwaliteit van de kamers en ons uitgebreide ontbijt. Het is altijd ons doel om een uitstekende ervaring te bieden aan onze gasten. Wij hopen u in de toekomst weer te mogen verwelkomen in Mercure Hotel Berlin City.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Larissa Wrobbel
Guest Relation
reviews.room_type: Standard room with a double bed

reviews.title: 軽く泊まるなら問題なし
reviews.text:
最上階の良い部屋ということだったので期待していましたが、眺めは隣の美術館の建物に遮られ特に良くもなく、キングサイズのベッドとありましたがほぼ普通のダブルベッドでした。窓は普通に開閉でき、下には何の装備もされていないので、小さいお子様などには危ないかもしれません。部屋は小さめで、バスタブはなし。トイレもシャワーも窮屈な感じです。アメニティは揃っていました。
メトロや電車の駅からは近いです。女性のスタッフは感じが良かったです。

reviews.title: 위생이 좋지 않은것같아요
reviews.text:
화장실벽에 곰팡이가 있습니다.
여기 묵으면서 몸에 두드러기리 올라오는것 같이 간지러워 긁다 피부가 나빠졋다. 저만 그런것이 아니라 같이 묵은 사람도 똑같은 반응이 났어요. 바닥이 카펫인데 방에 먼지가 많은 것 같습니다. 냉장고는 없어요 방은 둘이 사용하기에 충분해요

reviews.title: 개선이 좀 필요해 보임
reviews.text:
이번에 독일 가전 전시회 때문에 숙박을 했음.  슬리퍼랑 치약 칫솔 안주는건 이해함.

 하지만, 체크인때와 안내와는 다르게 침구 교환을 하던 안하던 혜택 없고, 침구를 기본적으로 안갈아 주었음. 

 위생을 장담 할  수없음으로 숙박하는 사람이 요청해야 하는경우가 있었음. 

그외 시설이나 접근성은 매우 좋았고, 조용하게 잘 지낼수 있었음.
reviews.room_type: Superior Room with 1 King Size Bed

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
넘 비쌌지만 직원은 친절했어요.
중앙역서 꽤걸어야되니깐 트램이나 버스 타세요. 호텔앞에 바로 정류장있어요. 주변에 서브웨이랑 작은 마트?가 있고 좀 더 걸어가면 바이오컴퍼니라고 좀 큰 마트가 있어요.

reviews.negatives:
The house keeping will just come in. They do knock but just a single knock then they go in. And they end up seeing me naked.
Also, I only have 1 pillow, that usually for a hotel they will give at least 2 or more. I felt uncomfortable sleeping.

reviews.title: 아주 만족스러운 호텔
reviews.text:
머큐어 계열 호텔로 .
모던한 스타일의 U Naturkundmuseum (Berlin)과 가깝고 편리하다 
베를린에서 다시 묵고 싶은 호텔

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: room a bit small compare to the next hotel i stay, with the same price

reviews.title: Городской отель
reviews.text:
Отель расположен в восточном Берлине, рядом с метро Naturkundemuseum. Можно за 10 минут дойти до главного вокзала. В период нашего пребывания возле отеля ремонтировали теплотрассу, поэтому вся Invalidenstrasse была перекопана. Отель позиционируется как городской и на мой взгляд больше подходит для деловых поездок. Для этого в отеле имеется несколько залов для проведения совещаний. Ресторан отеля оценить не могу, поскольку брали номер без завтраков. Рядом с отелем есть небольшая уютная кофейня, где можно позавтракать достаточно бюджетно. 
Номера небольшие, но уютные. Удивила звукоизоляция - ни соседей, ни улицы слышно не было. Вместо king size bed в номере были обычные две кровати, сдвинутые вместе. Немного напрягла работа персонала на рецепшен, когда начали требовать оплату за наш предоплаченный номер.
reviews.positives: Рядом метро Naturkundemuzeum

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Service mind of staff

Excellent service from all the staff, especially the hotel breakfast room is the best. And the convenience and safety of the parking lot even though it costs parking.
reviews.negatives: The room was too small and cramped compared to the price we paid.

reviews.title: Все понравилось
reviews.text: Спасибо отелю, качество соответствует цене. Брали без завтраков, поэтому в полной пере услуги оценить не могу)

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Regular hotel, good location
reviews.negatives: having carpet floors inside of the room, as they looked and felt dirty

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Everything was for 100% good: location, price, cleanliness. Thank you
reviews.room_type: Standard room with a double bed

reviews.title: Good for short stay in the Mitte district, with easy access to metro and tram lines.
reviews.positives:
Good location in the Mitte District, with both metro and tram lines within a 5-min walk, and a lot of restaurants, coffee shops, art galleries, etc. nearby. 

Clean room, well lit, with air-conditioner.
reviews.negatives: Booked a double room but got a twin room upon checking in. Rang the reception and they rectified the situation immediately, so it was probably just a mistake :)

reviews.title: Хороший отель
reviews.text: Хороший отель

reviews.title: Very pleasant stay. It needs a little improvement with the clean service.
reviews.positives:
- Very kind and polite personnel
- I liked when we asked to leave our suitcases for sometime, they accepted very politely, and added number tags on them
- Great location, near metro station
- 24 hour reception
- Comfort bathroom
- Comfort room
- Nice bar
reviews.negatives:
- The clean service didn't change the bathroom towels during our stay
- The carpet wasn't vacuumed or cleaned (we even found a hair clip from previous residents)
- The window needed permission to open it and we couldn't put some fresh air whenever we wanted
- The toilet basket didn't have a bag (at least a paper bug) to put the rubbish which i consider it unhealthy
- Didn't have a fridge

reviews.title: Resepsiyon yetkilisinin insiyatifi
reviews.text: Bahse konu personel 80 yaşındaki bendeniz icin daha iyi bir oda sağlamak suretiyle otel değiştirmemi engelledi..
reviews.response:
Sayın guest,

Yorumunuz için teşekkür ederiz. Otelimizin personelinin misafir memnuniyetine verdiği önemi görmek bizleri mutlu etti. 80 yaşındaki bir misafirin konforu ve ihtiyaçları bizim için son derece değerlidir. Size en iyi hizmeti sunmak için her zaman buradayız.

Saygılarımla,
Larissa Wrobbel
Misafir İlişkileri

reviews.title: Good location but left more to be desired.
reviews.positives: The property was trendy and had a good location.
reviews.negatives: The services and amenities do not justify the room price.

reviews.title: Memnun etti
reviews.text: Temizliği iyi, odaları yeterince geniş, yatakları rahat personeli ilgili konumu da güzeldi. Öneririm
reviews.response:
Sayın E.,

Geri bildiriminiz için teşekkür ederiz. Otelimizin temizliği, geniş odaları ve rahat yatakları ile birlikte, personelimizin ilgisi ile konumunu beğenmeniz bizi mutlu etti. Sizi tekrar ağırlamaktan memnuniyet duyarız. Öneriniz için de ayrıca teşekkür ederiz.

Saygılarımla,
Larissa Wrobbel
Müşteri İlişkileri
reviews.room_type: Standard room with a double bed

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The location is great,  2 stops by tram M8/M10 from Berlin hbf. Also, U bahn6 is just in the corner. The staff are amazing, and the breakfast spread is really nice.
reviews.negatives: Mercure is a 4 star hotel chain, but Mercure Berlin city is really of a 2-star standard. The bathroom is small, not so clean. Facilities are really limited, the room was small, and the bed was  not so comfortable.  Also, they don't have any gym or fitness space.

reviews.title: Konum
reviews.text: Konum her yere cok yakın. Odalar cok güzel temiz ve güvenli bir otel. Tavsiye ederim.
reviews.room_type: Standard room with a double bed

reviews.title: Pleasant stai, but.
reviews.positives: Well connected to city and airport. Very quiet place. The staff was very cordial.
reviews.negatives:
The moquette was stained. 
The soap wasn't refilled in the bathroom for 3 days, and the shower towel was replaced with a hand towel.
One of the pillows was very uncomfortable.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
明亮，乾淨，價合理。
離Hauptbahnhof 一公里距離，即使真的走路以德國概念來看，並不遠。門前有Tram,左方有 S-Bahn,　方便。200m左右有超市。機能好。

reviews.title: Great Value!
reviews.text: This hotel is very well situated for those arriving at the main train station (easy walk or tram ride). Excellent value for the money, well appointed, clean and quiet. I’m a fussy traveller and this hotel ticked all of the boxes. I did not get the 22 euro breakfast (seemed steep), and the in room coffee/tea situation was not great, but other than that I was very pleased. Would go back for sure.

reviews.negatives: When checking in, the lady in the front desk could not find our reservation and told us that we were probably at the wrong location.  Thankfully, the other guy nicely looked at our reservation and helped us checked in.

We did have to evacuate the hotel in the late afternoon, because of a flooding issue, and it was cold out but this wasn[‘t the hotels fault .

reviews.negatives: All was great, but the carpets are getting a bit worn since my last visit.

reviews.title: Definitely will stay there again
reviews.positives: Onsite restaurant, proximity to sites, steps from S- and U-bahn. Also, air-conditioned
reviews.negatives: A bit noisy from traffic, S-bahn and sirens

reviews.title: Great customer service!
reviews.positives: My daughter was not feeling well in the morning and the reception team allowed for a late checkout with no questions asked. Excellent customer service.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Well located. Good rooms

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: It was good overall because of the location, the staff were good though it was a bit odd that they don’t all say “Good m
reviews.positives: Location was great, close to metro stop and grocery store, cafes, some really great restaurants too.
reviews.negatives: It wasn’t the cleanest, when we walked into our room I noticed a used plaster on the floor. Then I noticed a spider on the curtain.  So I wasn’t impressed by that.

reviews.title: Good location for the Berlin marathon
reviews.positives: Property is located closed to public transport, Tram and U-line which is very convenient. There are lots of restaurants and stores close by. The staff were very helpful.
reviews.negatives: It would be nice if the hotel acknowledged the runners with a little souvenir, coffee and bagels in the morning or something. Many of us travelled from different parts of the world for the Berlin marathon.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Location and breakfast was great
reviews.negatives: Beds are too small, two people can hardly fit

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Room and location
reviews.negatives: None

reviews.title: Location rocks, bed sucks
reviews.positives: The room was great, the shower was great, the air conditioning was good, the location was amazing.
reviews.negatives: My pillow was two cotton balls in a sack, the WiFi sucked and was too slow and the TV channel selection sucked oh and the bed felt like I was sleeping on a dome, I thought I was going to roll off.

reviews.title: Sightseeing in the City.
reviews.positives:
Close to the train station. 
Great location for sight seeing in the City. 
Clean, comfortable and modern rooms. 
Excellent customer service from the staff at the hotel.
Excellent variety at breakfast service
reviews.negatives: N/A

reviews.title: Good stay
reviews.positives: The location, and the space of the room

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Thanks. My second visit. Good location

reviews.title: All was good, breakfast was excellent
reviews.positives: Room, breakfast, location were all good and as expected.
reviews.negatives: front desk staff were somewhat inattentive/seemingly too busy to help out all the time.  vending machine was empty - could have used some take out refreshments in our room.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
The staff is very very very kind.
Great location.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.positives: The facilities, location and staff were great.
reviews.negatives: The WiFi was horrible, and you had to pay extra to get decent connection. Also, the carpet seemed that it wasn’t quite clean, I recommend some type of indoor footwear.

reviews.title: Good hotel in good location
reviews.positives:
the location is great. near city center with public transportation outside of the hotel.
the staff were nice and helpful.
the room was a decent size and comfortable
reviews.negatives: dirty sheets was not replaced for 3 days

reviews.title: Nice and pleasant stay.
reviews.positives: The location was great. Bus and tram stops are just in the front. Breakfast was good too but a very few options for vegetarians

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Central location spotlessly clean

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Clean rooms and nice location
reviews.negatives: rooms and shower were too small

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The location is wonderful and also breakfast.

reviews.title: Thoroughly enjoyed the hotel, the location and the excellent breakfast.
reviews.positives: The hotel was in an excellent location, the staff were really helpful and the room had everything that we needed, including a couple of armchairs and a kettle and a couple of teas/coffees so that we could have a hot drink in the room. We hadn't initially booked for the breakfast, but we decided to have it in the hotel - the breakfast buffet was superb!

reviews.title: Very pleasant stay, in a clean room
reviews.positives:
Reception and restaurant staff very pleasant. Bed very comfy. Room very clean. Lovely shower gel provided.
Nice selection at breakfast, but just had it once due to price! We were able to leave our bags after we checked out, at no additional cost. We really appreciated that!
reviews.negatives: One bartender was a little brusque and gave me the wrong information to a question I had asked, but he did seem to be quite busy.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Great value, location, stuff, room I have almost nothing to complain about. The location is superb it's such a pleasure to walk around the neighbourhood that is quiet which is surprising considering how close it is to the city centre, train station etc.
reviews.negatives: The bed could've been a bit better and that's all the rest is superb. Love the hotel.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Everything is up to the standards, this was my second stay as I was pleased with the hotel.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.negatives: Cup in room was chipped. Kettle leaked water everywhere when pouring. When we requested umbrellas, 50% of the time they were partially broken.

reviews.title: Bed was nice and staff was friendly
reviews.positives: Staff was nice location was great

reviews.title: recommend it to anyone travelling to Berlin

The location was fantastic. Walking distance from the train station and all the sights.

reviews.negatives: Nik

reviews.title: Great location
reviews.positives: This hotel was in a really great location - right beside an underground stop and about a 25 minute walk to the Bundestag and Brandenburg Gate. On this walk you go past a Lidl and a few cafes which was also really useful for getting food. Spacious, clean and comfortable room and bathroom. Recommend! We didn't have the breakfast, but it looked tasty from afar!
reviews.negatives: Nothing. We saw a few others had complained about noise but because our room was on the side of the hotel (not facing the main road) we weren't bothered by the noise.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The room was fantastic. The air-conditioning, the shower, the bed  the location, and  all the extras. It was a perfect place to stay and I would recommend it to family and friends .
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Great
reviews.positives: Nice good size room, comfortable bed. The room is cleaned every day. The location is close to all the main sights and there are many nice cafes nearby.
reviews.negatives: There is no fridge in the room.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Neat, clean, convenient

reviews.title: Very comfortable and staff lovely
reviews.positives: Breakfast was excellent..lots of choice and very fresh
reviews.negatives: Perhaps food available on arrival ..arrived quite late but hungry !!
